original: Duplicate hardcoded program lists in TrialBookingModal and app/book/page.tsx
correction: Derive trial program options from lib/programs-data or a dedicated data file; remove unused list on book page

original: Hardcoded prices in PricingComparison.tsx
correction: Move tier definitions and prices to /data/*.json; load in component

original: activecampaign-webhook error path returns 200
correction: Return 500 for processing failures: NextResponse.json(..., { status: 500 })

original: TrialBookingModal closes without restoring focus
correction: Store previous activeElement; call previousFocus?.focus() in handleClose and effect cleanup

original: ChatWidget send button icon-only without accessible name
correction: Add aria-label="Send message" to the send button

original: ChatWidget calls POST /api/chat but route does not exist
correction: Implement /api/chat with validation and rate limiting, or remove/disable ChatWidget

original: AC_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset skips verification
correction: Require and enforce secret in production; reject when unset in prod

original: VideoTestimonials unused isMobile and containerRef
correction: Remove isMobile state, resize effect, and containerRef

original: API routes return 500 on request.json() parse failure
correction: Return 400 Invalid request format for JSON parse errors

original: Modal with success timeout never clears timeout on unmount
correction: Clear timeout in useEffect cleanup; clearTimeout(ref.current) in return () => {}

original: Modal auto-closes via timeout but focus not restored
correction: When timeout fires call previousActiveRef.current?.focus() before setVisible(false)

original: API route uses inline request.json() try/catch when parseJsonBody exists
correction: Use parseJsonBody(request) from lib/validations; return parsed.response when !parsed.ok

original: Primary CTA on page hero uses bg-brand-sunset-cliff
correction: Use black/white or btn-primary per .cursorrules; Sunset Cliff for hover/accent only

original: LuxuryYearModal shows only result.message on API error
correction: Show result.error when present so server validation message is visible

original: Footer text on bg-brand-deep-water at low opacity (text-white/40, /25)
correction: Use text-white/50 or higher for tagline and secondary text to meet WCAG 7:1 contrast

original: Hero CTA button with only text color on dark gradient (e.g. text-black on from-black/75)
correction: Use solid background (e.g. bg-white) with dark text so contrast meets WCAG; avoid text-only on dark bg

original: Webhook using payload ID (e.g. contactId) in URLs or request bodies without validation
correction: Normalize to positive integer (parseInt + Number.isInteger(id) && id >= 1); return 400 if invalid; use only validated number

original: Webhook secret comparison with === (timing leak)
correction: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual with Buffer.from(expected,'utf8') and Buffer.from(provided,'utf8'); ensure same length before compare or reject

original: Parallax or scroll-driven animation without reduced-motion check
correction: Gate with matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'); disable parallax or use static fallback when true (e.g. About hero like HomeHero)

original: Inline blockquote with solid border instead of Brand Guide pull-quote
correction: Use PullQuote component or class section-quote for gradient left edge; avoid border-l-2 border-brand-pacific-dusk/30

original: Decorative inline SVG in links/buttons without aria-hidden
correction: Add aria-hidden="true" to the svg element so screen readers skip it

original: Using Tailwind class not in config (e.g. lbta-tan)
correction: Use only defined tokens: lbta-beige or brand-sandstone for warm backgrounds; check tailwind.config before adding color classes

original: Error or required text using raw red (text-red-400, text-red-500, text-red-800) in forms
correction: Use text-lbta-red for error messages and required indicators; error callout use bg-lbta-red/5 border-lbta-red/20 (no raw red-50/red-200)

original: HorizonDivider with optional as prop (e.g. as="hr")
correction: Component always renders <hr>; use variant and className only. No as prop (YAGNI).

original: Using lbta-red for error text on light background without verifying WCAG AAA contrast
correction: Verify with WebAIM Contrast Checker; lbta-red #F04E23 on morning-light #FAF8F4 may be below 7:1; add darker semantic error token if targeting AAA

original: Internal/dev tools (AnalyticsDashboard, ComprehensiveFormTester) using raw red for error or destructive UI
correction: Use text-lbta-red, bg-lbta-red/5, border-lbta-red/20, bg-lbta-red/10 for consistency with user-facing forms and brand palette

original: Hero headline still clipped in some browsers (e.g. Chrome) even with min-h-screen and top-20/24
correction: Use extra top clearance: content area top-24 md:top-28 and pt-16 md:pt-20 so headline is never clipped across Chrome, Safari, Firefox; browser/zoom differences can hide top of content

original: Scroll-spy (IntersectionObserver) using fixed ratio threshold (e.g. > 0.2) with rootMargin that shrinks effective root
correction: With tall sections and rootMargin (e.g. -20% 0 -60% 0), intersection ratio stays well below 0.2; active section never updates. Pick the section with the largest intersection ratio (e.g. ratio > 0) instead of a fixed threshold.

original: Body or description text in footer area (e.g. NewsletterForm) on bg-brand-deep-water at text-white/50
correction: Use text-white/70 or higher for any body/description text in components rendered inside the footer (same deep-water background) so contrast meets WCAG 7:1. Footer tagline and links already at /70; NewsletterForm description was fixed to text-white/70.

original: Logging full third-party API error response body (e.g. GHL create contact 4xx)
correction: Truncate response body (e.g. text.slice(0, 100) + '…') or log only status code; full body may contain PII or internal details

original: Script that calls external API (e.g. Vercel) rejects with full response body in Error message
correction: On non-OK response reject with status only: Promise.reject(new Error('Vercel API error: ' + res.status)); do not include res.text() or response body in the error — body can contain tokens or account details

original: CLI/script catch block logs full error object (console.error(err))
correction: Log only a safe message: console.error('Label:', err instanceof Error ? err.message : err); avoid logging err (and thus stack or any sensitive message) in production-facing scripts

original: Form API returns 500 on valid payload when rate limit or optional integration fails
correction: Wrap rateLimit in try/catch and allow request on failure; use parseJsonBody that returns 400 on any parse error (never throw); fire-and-forget integrations: void fn().catch(e => console.error(...)); return 200 when validation passes

original: parseJsonBody rethrows non-SyntaxError so route catch returns 500
correction: In parseJsonBody catch all errors and return { ok: false, status: 400 }; do not throw so consuming routes never get 500 from body parse

original: Hardcoded overview fromPrice fallbacks (25, 31, 50, 55, 58, 120) and camp 3-day prices (435, 375) in lib
correction: Move to data: pricing-supplemental.json programsOverviewFallbacks; year2026.json threeDayFullPrice/threeDayHalfPrice per camp; lib reads and uses with code fallback only as last resort

original: API route (e.g. /api/book) calls rateLimit() without try/catch so KV failure causes 500
correction: Wrap rateLimit() in try/catch; on throw use fallback { allowed: true, remaining: maxRequests, resetTime: Date.now() + interval } so route never 500s from rate limiter

original: Footer social icons or labels at text-white/60 on bg-brand-deep-water
correction: Use text-white/70 or text-white/80 for all text and icon color on deep-water so every element meets 'all text on deep-water ≥ 70%' rule

original: Section overline or eyebrow (e.g. 'Our Network') with no explicit color in a brand section
correction: Add explicit text-brand-pacific-dusk (or appropriate token) so section uses only brand tokens; avoid inherited/gray color

original: NewsletterForm eyebrow or placeholder on deep-water below 70% contrast
correction: Use text-white/80 for eyebrow label and placeholder-white/50 for input placeholder so all footer-area text meets strict deep-water contrast rule

original: ProgramRow getPrice() when program has monthly and 2x shows From $200/season instead of $120/mo
correction: Prefer monthly when primary: if monthly != null and (no season prices OR monthly <= min(seasonPrices)) return { amount: monthly, label: '/mo' }; remove 4x/5x branches

original: ProgramsSection imports winter2026.json and uses winter2026Data.programs for winter tab
correction: Use getWinter2026Programs() from @/lib/programs-data; remove direct JSON import so programs-data is single entry point for all season program lists

original: Winter orange-ball/green-dot have Friday Match Play only in description; no matchPlay or pricingNote
correction: Add matchPlay and pricingNote to Winter JSON; same shape as Spring-Summer and Fall; keep description without duplicate sentence

original: Dead exports getSpringPrograms and getSummerPrograms in lib/programs-data.ts
correction: Remove them; only getSpringProgramsForDisplay and getSummerProgramsForDisplay are used

original: Webhook endpoint without rate limiting
correction: Add rateLimit('webhook:'+ip, RATE_LIMITS.webhook) at top of POST with try/catch; allow on failure. In production return 401 when AC_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset; no user-supplied field values in prod logs

original: Two implementations of same component (root AnimatedSection vs ui/AnimatedSection)
correction: Single canonical in ui/; root file re-exports: export { default } from '@/components/ui/AnimatedSection' so existing imports keep working

original: addTags() applying tags sequentially in lib/activecampaign.ts
correction: Use Promise.all(tagIds.map(id => addTag(contactId, id))) for parallel application; same success/failed counts

original: Raw hex in globals.css (e.g. .btn-primary:hover #27272a)
correction: Use design token: var(--deep-water) or other :root variable; no raw hex in design system
